This model would run you $1,049 were it at full price, but it’s dropping down to the second-best rate we have tracked in four months here while the savings last, beaten out by a short-term lightning sale that took things $35 lower last week. While we have seen the price go lower in 2025, those rates haven’t been seen since Black Friday, with the 30% markdown here still giving you a solid $314 cut from the tag. If you’re looking for a cheaper alternative, you can find a number of Dyson’s other vacuums, air purifiers, and fans getting up to 39% savings starting from $230 here.
